rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiff Interrogatories To Defendants From The Pep Boys Manny Moe Jack Of California
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, July 31, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Brayton Purcell plaintiffs¿ motion to compel responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiff interrogatories to defendants from The Pep Boys Manny Moe Jack of California is off calendar as moot pursuant to the Case Management Order filed June 29, 2012 rescinding asbestos General Orders. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/TLJ)
